title: Egyptian Quinoa Pilaf with Spicy Shrimp
description: A flavorful and nutritious Middle Eastern-inspired dish made with quinoa, pilaf, and spicy shrimp.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add quinoa and pilaf and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add water, salt, and srirly. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until quinoa and pilaf are tender and liquid has been absorbed.
While quinoa is cooking, heat a separate saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side or until pink and cooked through.
Add lemon juice to the shrimp and toss to coat.
Fluff cooked quinoa and pilaf with a fork and stir in chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve quinoa pilaf topped with spicy shrimp and additional lemon wedges, if desired.
Garnish with additional chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
